design_context.overall_description: A cozy apartment minimal and modern

eb1a5fb3-2768-4da5-be17-4609365b521a.generated_prompt: A photorealistic, eye-level, wide-angle interior photograph at 24mm focal length captures a modern master bedroom. Indirect natural light spills from a large, floor-to-ceiling window on the right wall, angled to softly illuminate the off-white plaster walls, creating subtle shadows that enhance the room's depth. The pristine white ceiling features discreet recessed lighting with a warm 3000K color temperature, casting a soft glow directly onto the bed and a honed Calacatta marble bedside table. The centerpiece is a substantial 1.8m wide bed with a wooden frame and a tall headboard in a warm, reddish-brown wood tone. The headboard extends the width of the bed, featuring a central panel that is slightly recessed and has square cutouts with dark mirrored inserts on either side, creating a sleek, integrated look. The bed base is solid wood, with three square recessed panels carved into the front, adding a subtle decorative element. It is covered with matte white linen bedding and layered with beige throws, and two large square pillows in a slightly darker matte beige fabric. To the left of the bed, a bespoke light oak veneer wardrobe with integrated handles spans the remaining wall space, its matte finish diffusing reflections. On the right, a single floating honed Calacatta marble bedside table, 0.5m wide, is anchored to the wall, holding a minimalist white ceramic lamp with a warm, dimmable LED bulb. Adjacent to the bedside table, a sleek light oak veneer dressing table with integrated handles and a large, minimalist round mirror above it offers a functional and stylish element, alongside a minimalist computer table integrated into the design. The flooring is a continuous expanse of large-format, polished beige concrete tiles, reflecting the ambient light with a subtle sheen. The atmosphere is serene and inviting, with a minimalist aesthetic emphasizing clean lines and geometric forms, embodying a cozy, modern sensibility.
